王权富贵: Wangquan Fugui, legendary Daoist heir of the Wangquan clan, calm and resolute, black hair tied back, travel-worn Taoist cloak and belt, long sword at waist (Wangquan Sword), steady gaze yet gentle warmth, carries the belief that the world belongs to all living beings, heroic but tender when facing Qingtong, ancient Chinese style, ink-painting vibe, poetic atmosphere
清瞳: Qingtong, spider-spirit lady reformed by love, soft golden hair in simple ribbon, clear bright eyes, light white-and-blue hanfu with fine embroidery, gentle and steadfast, threads/silken strands motif around hands, elegant yet determined, deeply devoted to Fugui, ancient Chinese style, ink-painting vibe, poetic atmosphere
